response.global_analysis: The audio consists of English dialogue between Hololive Myth members celebrating their 5th anniversary, followed by a presentation of anniversary merchandise. The provided Reference JSON for 'Fortune Spinner' does not match the audio content of this segment, which is primarily conversational. I am ignoring the 'Fortune Spinner' lyrics and transcribing the spoken dialogue and on-screen text directly from the video. Subtitles are precisely timed to vocal bursts and on-screen text appearances.

subtitles.original: I'm not gonna give up yet, because...
subtitles.english: I'm not gonna give up yet, because...

subtitles.original: Because...
subtitles.english: Because...

subtitles.original: I'd like to think that we're not gonna give up yet,
subtitles.english: I'd like to think that we're not gonna give up yet,

subtitles.original: because there's still so much that I want to do,
subtitles.english: because there's still so much that I want to do,

subtitles.original: the three of us together.
subtitles.english: the three of us together.

subtitles.original: Together!
subtitles.english: Together!

subtitles.original: You know?
subtitles.english: You know?

subtitles.original:
And I didn't think that I would be here
five years from the start with you guys.
subtitles.english:
And I didn't think that I would be here
five years from the start with you guys.

subtitles.original: Same!
subtitles.english: Same!

subtitles.original: Yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah.

subtitles.original: I really thought I'd be out of here.
subtitles.english: I really thought I'd be out of here.

subtitles.original: Same!
subtitles.english: Same!

subtitles.original:
But now I can't see a future where I'm not here
with you guys, so for now...
subtitles.english:
But now I can't see a future where I'm not here
with you guys, so for now...

subtitles.original: Oh, that's so nice! That's so...
subtitles.english: Oh, that's so nice! That's so...

subtitles.original: Oh shucks!
subtitles.english: Oh shucks!

subtitles.original: Okay.
subtitles.english: Okay.

subtitles.original: So because of that, I'm not gonna give up yet.
subtitles.english: So because of that, I'm not gonna give up yet.

subtitles.original: I don't want to give up yet, so let's do our best!
subtitles.english: I don't want to give up yet, so let's do our best!

subtitles.original: Jingle jingle!
subtitles.english: Jingle jingle!

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, the wrapping-up music is playing!
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, the wrapping-up music is playing!

subtitles.original:
I'm just gonna start talking about nothing
because it annoys me when they play the jingle...
subtitles.english:
I'm just gonna start talking about nothing
because it annoys me when they play the jingle...

subtitles.original: ...to tell me to stop.
subtitles.english: ...to tell me to stop.

subtitles.original:
This morning I ate a bagel
and I had cream cheese on it.
subtitles.english:
This morning I ate a bagel
and I had cream cheese on it.

subtitles.original: It was delicious, but it went over my macros!
subtitles.english: It was delicious, but it went over my macros!

subtitles.original:
And so I'm in big trouble with my trainer,
but it's fine! It's fine!
subtitles.english:
And so I'm in big trouble with my trainer,
but it's fine! It's fine!

subtitles.original: Anyway, you can't get rid of me!
subtitles.english: Anyway, you can't get rid of me!

subtitles.original: Alright!
subtitles.english: Alright!

subtitles.original: You can't get rid of any of us, hopefully!
subtitles.english: You can't get rid of any of us, hopefully!

subtitles.original:
Everybody, all good things come to an end,
unfortunately...
subtitles.english:
Everybody, all good things come to an end,
unfortunately...

subtitles.original:
...but thank you so much to the Holo EN community
for supporting us continuously for five years!
subtitles.english:
...but thank you so much to the Holo EN community
for supporting us continuously for five years!

subtitles.original:
Thank you to the girls today and all the staff-san
that supported us also for this celebration...
subtitles.english:
Thank you to the girls today and all the staff-san
that supported us also for this celebration...

subtitles.original: ...who gave us the trophies!
subtitles.english: ...who gave us the trophies!

subtitles.original: Yeah, once again, congratulations to us!
subtitles.english: Yeah, once again, congratulations to us!

subtitles.original: To us! Of five years!
subtitles.english: To us! Of five years!

subtitles.original: Yay! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you!

subtitles.original: Thanks everyone! Bye bye!
subtitles.english: Thanks everyone! Bye bye!

subtitles.original: Bye bye! Peace!
subtitles.english: Bye bye! Peace!

subtitles.original: Thanks! Don't forget the merch!
subtitles.english: Thanks! Don't forget the merch!

subtitles.original: Buy the merch! Merch, please!
subtitles.english: Buy the merch! Merch, please!

subtitles.original: The merch is out! Nice!
subtitles.english: The merch is out! Nice!

subtitles.original: Next is the merchandise announcement!
subtitles.english: Next is the merchandise announcement!

subtitles.original:
We have Hololive English -Myth-
5th Anniversary Celebration merch being released!
subtitles.english:
We have Hololive English -Myth-
5th Anniversary Celebration merch being released!

subtitles.original: Let's look at the details. Check it out!
subtitles.english: Let's look at the details. Check it out!

subtitles.original:
First up, we've got the Mirror Acrylic Panel.
ミラーアクリルパネル
subtitles.english:
First up, we've got the Mirror Acrylic Panel.
Mirror Acrylic Panel

subtitles.original:
It's designed so that the illustrations have a
metallic mirrored vibe. So cool!
subtitles.english:
It's designed so that the illustrations have a
metallic mirrored vibe. So cool!

subtitles.original:
I absolutely love this illustration.
Hope you guys do too!
subtitles.english:
I absolutely love this illustration.
Hope you guys do too!

subtitles.original:
Next up, we have the Collection Cards.
コレクションカード 全3種
subtitles.english:
Next up, we have the Collection Cards.
Collection Card (3 Types)

subtitles.original:
These cards feature a shiny metallic finish.
メタリック仕様！
subtitles.english:
These cards feature a shiny metallic finish.
A metallic finish!

subtitles.original:
And you can choose from three different designs.
Also, the backside is matching for us all.
subtitles.english:
And you can choose from three different designs.
Also, the backside is matching for us all.

subtitles.original: Make sure to get the one from your oshi for sure!
subtitles.english: Make sure to get the one from your oshi for sure!

subtitles.original:
Next up, we have the Coin Medals.
コインメダル 全3種
subtitles.english:
Next up, we have the Coin Medals.
Coin Medal (3 Types)

subtitles.original:
Our shiny 5th anniversary commemorative
coin medals!
subtitles.english:
Our shiny 5th anniversary commemorative
coin medals!

subtitles.original:
There's one design for each member.
裏面共通デザイン
subtitles.english:
There's one design for each member.
Common design on the back

subtitles.original:
They come in an antique gold-plated finish
inside the original packaging.
subtitles.english:
They come in an antique gold-plated finish
inside the original packaging.

subtitles.original: Ooh, so shiny!
subtitles.english: Ooh, so shiny!

subtitles.original:
Oh man, everything looks so good! But I'm especially
interested in what we have to show you guys next.
subtitles.english:
Oh man, everything looks so good! But I'm especially
interested in what we have to show you guys next.

subtitles.original:
Next up, we have the Anniversary Hat!
記念帽子 森カリオペ
subtitles.english:
Next up, we have the Anniversary Hat!
Anniversary Hat - Mori Calliope

subtitles.original:
This one uses a soft, fluffy fabric.
The Death Sensei part is removable!
subtitles.english:
This one uses a soft, fluffy fabric.
The Death Sensei part is removable!

subtitles.original:
So you can also rock it without him.
Make sure that you check it out!
subtitles.english:
So you can also rock it without him.
Make sure that you check it out!

subtitles.original:
It's super stylish, I love the shape so much,
and all of my member Dead Beats voted on it together!
subtitles.english:
It's super stylish, I love the shape so much,
and all of my member Dead Beats voted on it together!

subtitles.original:
Next up we have mine, the Anniversary Hat
from Takanashi Kiara!
subtitles.english:
Next up we have mine, the Anniversary Hat
from Takanashi Kiara!

subtitles.original:
Looks like this! Decorative parts are removable,
and it can be worn reversibly!
subtitles.english:
Looks like this! Decorative parts are removable,
and it can be worn reversibly!

subtitles.original:
Inside out, so you'll have a different color,
and it's a bucket hat style design.
subtitles.english:
Inside out, so you'll have a different color,
and it's a bucket hat style design.

subtitles.original:
Which we didn't have before for me.
Very fashionable, I must say!
subtitles.english:
Which we didn't have before for me.
Very fashionable, I must say!

subtitles.original:
Last but not least, we have my hat,
the Anniversary Hat Ninomae Ina'nis!
subtitles.english:
Last but not least, we have my hat,
the Anniversary Hat Ninomae Ina'nis!

subtitles.original:
The ribbon part is removable, and the patches
are super cute too. 記念帽子 一伊那尓栖
subtitles.english:
The ribbon part is removable, and the patches
are super cute too. Anniversary Hat Ninomae Ina'nis

subtitles.original: You can wear it to become Takodachi. Yes!
subtitles.english: You can wear it to become Takodachi. Yes!

subtitles.original:
And yeah, you can mix and match with or without
the ribbon for different looks.
subtitles.english:
And yeah, you can mix and match with or without
the ribbon for different looks.

subtitles.original: So everyone, be sure to check our merch out!
subtitles.english: So everyone, be sure to check our merch out!

subtitles.original: And that concludes our 5th year anniversary stream!
subtitles.english: And that concludes our 5th year anniversary stream!

subtitles.original: Out to Myth!
subtitles.english: Out to Myth!
